result.stdout:
Unexpected argument: --help

Usage: dotnet fixie [project]... [options] [-- [custom arguments]...]


    project
        The name of a test project to run. When this option
        is omitted, the project in the current directory is
        assumed. Specify multiple project names or use * wildcards
        to run multiple test projects.

    -c <configuration>
    --configuration <configuration>
        The configuration under which to build. When this option
        is omitted, the default configuration is `Debug`.

    -n
    --no-build
        Skip building the test project prior to running it.

    -f <framework>
    --framework <framework>
        Only run test assemblies targeting a specific framework.

    -t <pattern>
    --tests <pattern>
        Run only the tests whose full names match the given pattern.

    --
        Signifies the end of built-in arguments and the beginning
        of custom arguments.

    custom arguments
        Arbitrary arguments made available to custom discovery/execution classes.
